race.comment: SPEEDTAIL (6) has built nicely into this campaign. Was sent forward from the wide gate last time before being run down late. Keeps the 2kg claimer and should be peaking fourth-up. BIG SUE (1) found the line well fresh without threatening an impressive winner. Strips fitter but will likely drift back again from the wide alley. Watch for her warming late. GRINZINGER HALO (7) has been below her best this campaign but the form around her stacks up. Drops back in trip off a 35-day freshen and is worth keeping in mind. TAPINFORPAR (2) lacks early speed so will likely land sticky from the inside draw but if the pace is genuine and the gaps appear, he can cause a late scare. TRANTORO (8) returns and is a noted fresh performer. Hard to give a serious push without a public trial to assess.
